statement: In every magma, Equation 1162 (`x = y * ((z * (x * w)) * u)`) implies Equation 3992 (`x * y = (z * (x * y)) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0638
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op x w)) u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op (op z (op x y)) x)
